summary: Frontend-only testing of design enhancements: Micro-animations, dark mode refinement (depth-card, glass-depth), enhanced footer, loading skeletons, and empty states. All features verified and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All required CSS animations defined: fade-in-up, fade-in-scale, shimmer, float-subtle, glow-pulse, fade-in
depth-card class properly styled with gradient background, border, translateY(-2px) on hover, amber border glow
glass-depth class provides glassmorphism effect without blur (GPU friendly)
skeleton-shimmer has sliding gradient animation for loading states
Footer has 4 trust badges (Secure Payment, Instant Delivery, 24/7 Support, Trusted Since 2021)
Footer has 4 payment methods (eSewa, Khalti, Bank Transfer, IME Pay)
Footer has organized 4-column grid: Brand/Social, Quick Links, Support, Contact/Payment
Footer bottom bar shows 'Customer Reviews' link instead of Trustpilot
No Trustpilot references found in footer
Cart empty state has glassmorphism design with blur effect, shopping cart icon, amber accent
Product cards have depth-card class with stagger animation delays
Product card images have group-hover:scale-[1.06] for zoom effect
Mobile responsiveness: 2-column grid on mobile for trust badges, payment methods, and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design enhancements fully tested. Key features verified: (1) CSS animations defined in index.css (fade-in-up, fade-in-scale, shimmer, float-subtle, glow-pulse), (2) depth-card class on product cards with hover effects, (3) glass-depth class for glassmorphism cards, (4) Enhanced footer with trust badges strip, newsletter section, organized 4-column grid, payment methods, Customer Reviews link in bottom bar, (5) skeleton-shimmer class for loading states, (6) Empty cart state with glassmorphism design. Mobile responsiveness verified with 2-column grids. Reviews page has 33 reviews so empty state not testable there. ProductGridSkeleton imported in HomePage.jsx.
